selfUserids.description: Enterprise userids that count as 'you/your team' (group owner check). Empty array = treat all groups as self-owned.

wechatMcpServerName.description: Name of the registered openclaw MCP server that proxies wechat-decrypt

wecomCorpId.description: WeCom enterprise corpid; used for refresh_index / WeCom API calls

ingestAuthToken.description: Bearer token shared with powerdata.notify_filter for the wechat ingest webhook. When set, plugin registers POST /plugins/openclaw-customer-bridge/ingest. Leave unset to disable the ingest route.

ingestDefaultAgentId.description: Default agent id for ingest-created sessions. Future: route per chat_id via lookup table.

ingestStubMode.description: When true the ingest endpoint logs but does not write to the OpenClaw session transcript. Useful for wire-level e2e tests without polluting real session history.
